accessKeyId.description: AWS access key ID. When omitted, falls back to the AWS credential chain (AWS_PROFILE, IAM role, etc.).

secretAccessKey.description: AWS secret access key. When omitted, falls back to the AWS credential chain (IAM role, etc.).

forcePathStyle.description: Use path-style URLs. Required for most S3-compatible storage.

prefix.description: Key prefix for all cache entries.

encryptionKey.description: AES-256-CBC encryption key. Encrypts all artifacts at rest.
